title: platydesma spathulatum
intro: Platydesma spathulatum, also known as the Kava Tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae and is native to the tropical forests of the Pacific Islands. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Platydesma spathulatum include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and alleviating pain, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. In terms of herbal preparations, the roots of the plant can be used to make a medicinal tea or a topical cream, and the leaves can be used to make a medicinal oil or tincture.
